title: Softban - Ban players without them noticing!
description: Maintain order without the harshness of a permaban!
body:
The **_SoftBan_** plugin allows server administrators to temporarily prevent players from joining the server without the social implications of a full ban. With just a simple command, you can add players to a softban list, preventing them from logging in while allowing you to maintain control over your server environment. Whether it’s for a short timeout or managing disruptive behavior, SoftBan is the perfect tool for server admins looking for a less confrontational approach.

**Features**

- **SoftBan:** Prevents specified players from logging into the server.
  
- **Simple Commands:** Easily add or remove players from the softban list with /addFakeCrash <playername> and /removeFakeCrash <playername>.
  
- **OP Access Only:** Commands are restricted to OPs, ensuring that only trusted individuals can manage the softban list.
  
- **Configurable:** Customize the player list via config.yml to manage softbans even when players are offline.

**Commands**

**/addFakeCrash <playername>:** Adds a player to the softban list, preventing them from joining the server.
**/removeFakeCrash <playername>:** Removes a player from the softban list, allowing them to log in again.

**Permissions:**

- softban.add: Grants permission to use /addFakeCrash.

- softban.remove: Grants permission to use /removeFakeCrash.

**Configuration:**

The plugin uses config.yml to maintain the list of players. Players can be added or removed from the list regardless of whether they are online.

![A picture reading the config.yml file](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b54977001b0ef56289bfa332fa715f756c5be8e4.png)


**Dependencies:**

Requires Paper server.

Manage your server effectively and gracefully without the harshness of a Permaban.
